title: Wiring including graphene layer and method of manufacturing the same
abstract: Provided are a wiring including a graphene layer and a method of manufacturing the wiring. The method may include growing a graphene layer on a substrate and doping the graphene layer with a metal. The graphene layer may be grown using a plasma of a hydrocarbon at a temperature of about 200Â° C. to about 600Â° C. by plasma enhanced chemical vapor deposition (PECVD).
claims: 1. A method of manufacturing a wiring, the method comprising: growing a graphene layer on a substrate using a plasma of a hydrocarbon at a temperature of about 200° C. to about 600° C. by plasma enhanced chemical vapor deposition (PECVD); and doping the graphene layer with a metal.
